title: digitalis lutea
intro: Digitalis lutea, also known as golden foxglove or yellow digitalis, is a perennial plant belonging to the foxglove family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its cardiac glycoside content, which helps regulate heart rhythm and increase cardiac output. The health benefits of Digitalis lutea include treating heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation, congestive heart failure, and angina, as well as lowering blood pressure and improving circulation. Herbal preparations of Digitalis lutea include dried leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
